title: Mob Farms Neoforge
description: Condenses complicated mob farms like creeper farms into a singular block
body:
### **THESE UPDATES ONLY APPLY TO THE 1.21.1 VERSION. I AM ACTIVELY WORKING ON V2.0.0 FOR 1.21.3/.4 BUT MOJANG HAS MADE IT VERY CHALLENGING TO DATA GENERATE. BECAUSE OF THIS, IT WILL MOST LIKELY BE SEVERAL MONTHS UNTIL I AM ABLE TO RELEASE AN UPDATE FOR 1.21.3. DO NOT COMPLAIN THAT STUFF ISN'T WORKING FOR 1.21.3 IF YOU HAVE NOT READ THIS! **
# Mob Farms

This mod condenses those multi-hundred or thousand block mob farms, that take hours to make and more hours to generate resources into one block. Every mob that drops something useful can be created.

- The crafting recipe for all the mob farms is simple as well.
  
- It requires something that the mob drops and a sword of your choice.
- The higher the tier of the sword, the faster the farm will drop.
  - Swords from other mods will work, but be warned. If you use a sword from another mod, it will default to the rate of a Wooden Sword. While this will be fixed in later updates, it will require other mod developers to add the rank manually.
- ALL farms have a sword on it.  
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fb08d0c7031cf07ffb5fe9d4ae9e0c6253f050e_0.webp)
- Using four materials of your choice, you can upgrade the sword within the block.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4143f9e510551c86f33764a64fc96804cf61cccf.png)

  - Downgrading is NOT supported
- You can enchant the sword used with the farm by combining an enchanted book that is compatible with the sword with the farm in the crafting table.
  
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b4243e17a42efcf31a56305b78a1202ae925a0e.png)

  
  - Sharpness of any level will increase the drop rate, regardless of sword level.
  - Looting of any level will increase the drop count, regardless of sword level
  - Fire Aspect on mob farms that drop meat will cause the meat to be cooked when dropped.
    - You cannot place multiple enchanted books in the crafting table at once.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b9965a05cd79b1dc529c705e539aad9aa78c067.png)
    - You can, however, combine enchantments onto a singular enchanted book and then place that in the crafting grid
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed5a1cce6f97b59515d35d7b7d2d5ec03ca4dd1b.png)
- Placing a farm block with enchantments in the crafting grid with nothing else will clear ALL enchantments from it

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8337342763b8f58ca2a79938ee52455d756f06f2.png)


- Some farms require a specific block to be underneath it or a specific location in order for it to work
- JEI or something similar is suggested to see recepies.

Join my Discord server to get early access to my mods before they are released anywhere else, as well as have the ability to help me develop new mods: https://discord.gg/XCrMsrXC3a


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

There is one mob farm whose recepie is hidden from JEI. I'm not going to say what it is, nor am I going to tell you what it drops. Do NOT share it with other players, let them figure it out

</details>
